description_long: This is a two-story house with a whimsical, storybook appearance, featuring a steeply pitched, multi-gabled roof covered in brown shingles. The exterior walls are painted a vibrant blue with visible wood plank textures, and the structure includes a prominent front porch with a wooden railing and steps leading up to the main entrance. The roofline is irregular, with one section appearing damaged or incomplete, adding to the house's unique character. Windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some boarded up or missing, and there is a small dormer above the porch. Decorative wooden trim and cross-bracing accentuate the gables, giving the house a Victorian or fantasy-inspired look. The overall design suggests a blend of traditional and whimsical architectural elements, making it stand out in an urban neighborhood.
description: A whimsical, blue two-story house with a steep, multi-gabled brown shingle roof, asymmetrical windows, and a front porch with wooden railings. Decorative trim and an irregular roofline give it a storybook, Victorian-inspired appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch with railings, and a prominent dormer above the porch.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the steep gable, decorative trim, and two windows on the lower level.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the irregular roofline, a boarded-up window, and fewer decorative elements.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a single window, steep gable, and partial view of the porch structure.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered front porch with wooden railings, steps, and a decorative dormer above the main door
